projectDescription: A full-stack, self-hostable invoicing and business management SaaS for freelancers and small businesses, built with Next.js, tRPC, and Prisma.
keyFeatures: Multi-tenant invoicing with PDF generation and email delivery via Resend
Client portal with token-based access for invoice viewing and online payment
Stripe and PayPal payment gateway integration with webhook-based status updates
Project management with time tracking, milestones, tasks, and built-in timers
Recurring invoices and expenses via Inngest background jobs
Expense tracking with categorization, suppliers, and file attachments
Financial reports: P&L, aging, unpaid invoices, tax liability, and year-end export
AI-powered features via Anthropic SDK (e.g., expense OCR confidence)
REST API v1 with Bearer-token auth for external integrations
Audit log, notifications, global search (Cmd+K), and multi-factor authentication
publicApiSurface: GET /api/v1/invoices — List invoices (paginated, filterable by status)
GET /api/portal/* — Token-based client portal API (no auth required)
